headline: Booking CEO Glenn Fogel Took Pay Cut in 2025 After 2 Big Years
summary: Even with the cut in total compensation, as well as in "compensation actually paid," we expect Fogel to be in the upper ranks of travel industry CEO compensation when the remaining companies report 2025 pay.

raw.headline: Booking CEO Glenn Fogel Took Pay Cut in 2025 After 2 Big Years
raw.summary: Even with the cut in total compensation, as well as in "compensation actually paid," we expect Fogel to be in the upper ranks of travel industry CEO compensation when the remaining companies report 2025 pay.

headline: Shares of travel and leisure companies are trading higher as energy prices pull back, easing inflation concerns, with oil declining on reports that the U.S. and Iran could hold another round of talks following failed negotiations last weekend.

headline: Booking Holding (BKNG) Holds Enduring Profitability in the Travel Industry
summary: Vltava Fund’s Q1 2026 letter, titled “Sport and Investing,” compares sports and investing, highlighting key market themes. A copy of the letter is available to download here. January focused on artificial intelligence, followed by the Iran war, which impacted businesses in the short- and long-term. Later, private credit gained attention amid rising interest rates, defaults, […]

headline: Here's What to Expect From Booking Holdings' Next Earnings Report
summary: Booking Holdings will release its first-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts anticipate a double-digit bottom-line growth.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Booking Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $214
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Ken Gawrelski   maintains Booking Holdings (NASDAQ:BKNG) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $215 to $214.
